summary: #80985 is the only hydrated open PR in this inventory shard. It is non-security-sensitive and appears to be a useful focused contributor fix, but it is not merge-ready from the provided preflight because mergeability is unknown, checks could not be hydrated due a GraphQL rate-limit error, review comments were not hydrated, and no Codex /review proof is present. Plan a contributor-branch repair/finalization path rather than merge or closure.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR should be finalized through a narrow repair/preflight pass before merge consideration; current artifact lacks the required merge proof.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalize contributor PR #80985 in place: refresh/rebase the maintainer-editable branch, hydrate and address any human or bot review comments, run Codex /review, run focused cron/outbound validation plus pnpm check:changed, then re-evaluate for merge with a complete merge_preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repairs and finalizes contributor PR #80985 by esqandil. The patch rejects unsupported announce plus webchat cron delivery at CLI creation/edit time and at runtime, keeps the documentation update, and preserves source PR attribution. Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/cron-cli.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-target.test.ts src/infra/outbound/channel-selection.test.ts; pnpm check:changed; Codex /review.
credit_notes: Preserve author credit for esqandil as the source contributor on PR #80985.
If a replacement PR ever becomes necessary, include source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80985 and credit esqandil in the PR body and changelog attribution.
